title: Persist the payment provider's transaction reference on the payment context
description: Every online payment now records the provider's transaction identifier (Stripe payment intent for card and bank transfer, PayPal capture id, Paybox/Up2Pay transaction number, or HUB PISP payment request id) on a dedicated providerTransactionRef column of the payment context when the payment is confirmed or captured. The reference is stored uniformly across all payment methods and apps, and an already-recorded reference is never overwritten, so a paid order or invoice can be reconciled to the actual provider transaction afterwards. Up2Pay now requests its transaction number via PBX_RETOUR (transaction:S).
